identity.name: Precision Protocol
core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: Data density must be high but legible.
Safety First: Use color (Orange/Red) only for status and action, never for decoration.
Tactile Feedback: Interactive elements must feel distinct and robust.
Mobile Utility: The factory floor experience is primary, not secondary.

heading.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and metric labels. Weights: 600 for headers, 900 for big numbers.

body.usage: Use for general text, labels, and form inputs.

mono.usage: MANDATORY for all tabular data, prices, SKUs, and stock counts.

rules: Tabular numbers must use 'font-mono' to ensure alignment.

primary.name: Safety Orange
primary.usage: Primary Actions (Save, Create), Active States, Critical Alerts.

background.usage: Page background is Slate-50. Sidebar is Slate-900.

surface.usage: Cards are white with Slate-200 borders.

theme_config.strategy: High Contrast Light Mode for content, Dark Mode for Navigation.

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed) + Top Bar (Sticky) + Main Content (Scrollable)

grid_system.detail_view: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 (2 cols for form, 1 col for meta/status)
grid_system.mobile: Single column stack. Tables convert to Card Lists on mobile.

specifics.Card: Must be white, 'rounded-md', 'border', 'shadow-sm'. Header must be distinct.
specifics.Button: Height 'h-10' or 'h-11' for touch targets. 'font-medium'. No rounded-full.
specifics.Badge: Use 'rounded-sm' (not full). Solid colors for status.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise on the Sidebar background to reduce banding.
visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid colors for precision.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use 'stroke-width={1.5}' for technical look.

images.description: Industrial factory floor with machinery, suitable for Login Page background.
Worker operating machinery, suitable for empty states or production module.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to use the 'Chivo' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts.
2. THEME: Override CSS variables in 'index.css' to match the 'Slate' + 'Safety Orange' palette.
3. COMPONENTS: When using Shadcn, strictly enforce the 'rounded-md' and 'border-slate-200' style. Do not use default rounded-xl.
4. MOBILE: Ensure all clickable elements are at least 44px height. Tables must scroll horizontally or switch to card view on mobile.
5. DATA: All prices and stock numbers must use 'font-mono'.
7. CHARTS: Use 'recharts' with the custom color palette (Orange for production, Blue for stock).
8. LOGIN: Use the provided factory floor image as a side-panel or background with overlay.

general: Avoid 'AI Slop' (generic centered layouts, excessive gradients).
Do not use emojis for icons. Use Lucide icons.
Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1).
Use 2-3x more padding than standard for breathing room, even in dense dashboards.
